text:
Pushed. Now in Vercel, make sure these settings are set:

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| **Root Directory** | `frontend` |
| **Build Command** | `bun run build` |
| **Output Directory** | `output` |
| **Install Command** | `bun install` |

If the project is already deployed, go to **Project → Settings → General** and update those fields, then trigger a redeploy. The `vercel.json` will handle the SPA routing so no more 404s on page refresh.
